name: codex-kit
description: Publishable Codex plugin wrapper for Codex Kit scaffolding workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Installable Codex plugin for Codex Kit.
interface.longDescription: Provides a standalone Codex plugin surface that wraps the public Codex Kit scaffold commands.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Kit to initialize a Codex-ready project in this repository.
Use Codex Kit to check scaffold status or update managed files.
